message:
chore: Bump version to 0.2.0

Release 0.2.0 includes:

Features:
- New `xf import` command for one-step archive setup from zip files
- Beautiful welcome box showing archive statistics after import
- Type-aware document disambiguation in search results

Fixes:
- Embeddings table now uses composite primary key (doc_id, doc_type) to
  handle ID collisions across document types (schema v3)
- Welcome box border alignment corrected
- Example path shortened to fit within UI borders

Documentation:
- Added "What's NOT in Your Archive" section to README explaining data
  limitations (no replies from others, no quote tweets of your content)
- Performance baseline documentation added

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
